name: Source Inspector
description: Interface for inspecting binding source artifacts before an OpenBindings interface exists. A source inspector reports its supported binding specifications and discovers bindable targets that tooling can offer to users.

BindingSpecInfo.description: Information about a supported binding specification.

bindingSpec.description: Binding specification identifier, exact and opaque (e.g., openbindings.openapi@1, openbindings.mcp@1).

description.description: Human-readable description of this binding specification.

Source.description: A binding source (binding-specification identifier plus location or content), as an OpenBindings document carries it. Open to extension fields so a document's source entry forwards verbatim.

bindingSpec.description: Binding specification identifier governing this source.

location.description: Absolute address of the source, per its binding specification (core OBI-D-05).

content.description: Embedded source-artifact representation, per its binding specification.

Operation.description: Potential OpenBindings operation framing for a bindable target.

BindableTarget.description: A target within a binding source that can be framed as an OpenBindings operation.

ref.description: Reference string to use in a binding entry.

operationKey.description: Suggested operation key for this target.

SourceInspection.description: Inspection result for a binding source artifact.

exhaustive.description: True when targets is the complete list of bindable targets for the source.

openbindings.source-inspector.listBindin.description: List the binding specifications this inspector can inspect, by exact identifier.

openbindings.source-inspector.inspectSou.description: Inspect a binding source artifact and return bindable targets that can be framed as operations.
